mapper.select: select id, tool_id, package_name, use_count, price, point_cost, pay_type, status, sort_order, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, delete_flag from osh_tool_package where tool_id = #{toolId} and delete_flag = 0 order by sort_order desc, id asc
mapper.insert: insert into osh_tool_package ( tool_id, package_name, use_count, price, point_cost, pay_type, status, sort_order, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, delete_flag ) values ( #{toolId}, #{packageName}, #{useCount}, #{price}, #{pointCost}, #{payType}, #{status}, #{sortOrder}, #{createBy}, now(), #{updateBy}, now(), 0 )
mapper.update: update osh_tool_package set package_name = #{packageName}, use_count = #{useCount}, price = #{price}, point_cost = #{pointCost}, pay_type = #{payType}, status = #{status}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = now(), delete_flag = 0 where id = #{id} and tool_id = #{toolId}
update osh_tool_package set delete_flag = 1, update_by = #{operator}, update_time = now() where tool_id = #{toolId} and delete_flag = 0
